pr.title: lb: improve fn_80027488 matching, tidy a few header signatures
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2507 made a small lb-library matching and header cleanup change: fn_80027488 in lbaudio_ax.c now uses standalone extern arrays lbl_80433984 and lbl_804338A4 instead of fields on lbl_80433710, with local declaration order adjusted for MWCC address materialization; several lb headers replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders with concrete void signatures already used by the .c files. The PR did not claim a full match, but reported fuzzy improvement for fn_80027488 from 89.55% to 94.86% and a green configure/ninja build.

key_files.role: Changed fn_80027488 local pointer sources from lbl_80433710 field accesses to standalone extern arrays and reordered declarations.
Replaced two UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with void(void) signatures.
Replaced four UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with void(void) signatures.
Replaced UNK_PARAMS and UNK_RET placeholders in several prototypes with concrete void or const char* signatures.

details: In fn_80027488, replaced int* a = lbl_80433710.x194 with int* a = lbl_804338A4.
In fn_80027488, replaced int* b = lbl_80433710.x274 with int* b = lbl_80433984.
Declared b before a; PR body says this makes MWCC materialize addresses in the order expected by the original.
Changed lb_8000FA94 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void lb_8000FA94(void).
Changed lb_80014534 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void lb_80014534(void).
Changed lb_8001955C, fn_800195FC, lb_800198E0, and lb_80019900 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).
Changed lb_8001C600, lb_8001CF18, and lb_8001D1F4 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).
Changed lb_8001C658 from const char* with UNK_PARAMS to const char* lb_8001C658(void).

smart_moves.text: Used symbol-backed standalone extern arrays instead of accessing the same addresses through fields on a larger struct, reducing misleading aggregate-field coupling in fn_80027488.
Kept the match claim honest: the PR reports a fuzzy-score improvement, explicitly states there is no 100% match, and describes the remaining MWCC register-cascade mismatch.
Updated headers to reflect concrete signatures already used by .c files instead of leaving ABI-obscuring UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching work, if symbols metadata identifies standalone objects at the exact addresses previously reached through struct fields, direct extern references may be a better source hypothesis than forcing those addresses through a broad aggregate field.
Local variable declaration order can affect MWCC address materialization and fuzzy-match score; in this PR, declaring b before a was used to influence the order of HA-half address setup.

When function bodies already prove no-argument void signatures, updating the owning headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete prototypes improves ABI honesty even when the macro expansion makes the compile result a no-op.

naming_conventions.convention: This PR preserves address-style names such as fn_80027488, lbl_804338A4, lbl_80433984, and lb_8001C600 rather than inventing semantic names.
naming_conventions.notes: Consistent with conservative naming; no PR evidence supports semantic renames for these symbols.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use direct extern array references for data at exact symbol addresses instead of struct-field accesses through lbl_80433710.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.purpose: Improve fn_80027488 fuzzy matching by changing address materialization/source data access shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.reported_result: fn_80027488 fuzzy score improved from 89.55% to 94.86%; no 100% match claimed.
caveats: The PR body cites symbols.txt, but the slice does not include the symbols.txt lines.
Remaining mismatch is described as one extra prologue instruction from MWCC register cascade choice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declare b before a to influence MWCC address materialization order.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.purpose: Make MWCC materialize the two addresses in the order the original expects.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.reported_result: Contributed to fuzzy-score improvement; not a full match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Declaration order can steer MWCC address materialization
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2507 reports that declaring b before a in fn_80027488 helped MWCC materialize addresses in the original order, improving fuzzy score from 89.55% to 94.86% without reaching a full match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when .c bodies prove void signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2507 replaced several lb header placeholders with concrete void signatures that the PR says the .c files already use; the change was compile-time no-op because the macros already expand to void, but made the ABI explicit.

source_update_candidates.title: lbaudio_ax fn_80027488 symbol-backed arrays at former lbl_80433710 field offsets
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2507 author states that lbl_804338A4 and lbl_80433984 are standalone extern arrays living at exactly the addresses previously accessed as lbl_80433710.x194 and lbl_80433710.x274, per symbols.txt. Curator should verify against symbols metadata before recording as a path fact.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful local data-access fact, but the cited symbols.txt lines are not included in the slice.

source_update_candidates.title: Header prototype cleanup when bodies prove signatures
source_update_candidates.text: Consider emphasizing that UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders should be removed from owning headers when existing .c definitions already prove concrete void or no-argument signatures, even if macro expansion makes the compile output unchanged.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is already broadly aligned with truthful-headers-and-includes; curator may decide whether this PR adds a useful concrete example rather than a new standard.

rejection_notes: Do not record fn_80027488 as matched; the PR explicitly says there were no 100% matches.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human reviews or review comments are present in the loaded slice.
Do not promote the exact symbols.txt address relationship as independently verified without checking the referenced symbols metadata.
